entities.name: SESBANIA BISPINOSA
entities.description: A legume species from which rhizobia were isolated.

entities.name: RHIZOBIA
entities.description: Fast growing nitrogen-fixing bacteria isolated from root nodules of Sesbania bispinosa.

entities.name: NODULE FRESH WEIGHT
entities.description: A measure of symbiotic performance of rhizobial isolates.

entities.name: PLANT DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: A measure of symbiotic performance of rhizobial isolates.

entities.name: NITROGENASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: The enzymatic activity responsible for nitrogen fixation exhibited by rhizobial strains.

entities.name: NODULATION COUNT
entities.description: The number of nodules formed on the plant roots by rhizobial isolates.

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of biological material produced by the plant-rhizobia symbiosis.

entities.name: ANTIBIOTIC RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of rhizobial strains to survive in the presence of specific antibiotics.

entities.name: CARBON SOURCE UTILIZATION
entities.description: The ability of rhizobial strains to utilize various carbon sources for growth.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of rhizobial strains to grow at various temperatures, up to 44°C.

entities.name: SALINITY TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of rhizobial strains to grow at salinity levels up to 600 mM NaCl.

entities.name: AMPICILLIN
entities.description: An antibiotic used to test resistance in rhizobial strains.

entities.name: CHLORAMPHENICOL
entities.description: An antibiotic used to test resistance in rhizobial strains.

entities.name: KANAMYCIN
entities.description: An antibiotic used to test resistance in rhizobial strains.

entities.name: PENICILLIN
entities.description: An antibiotic used to test resistance in rhizobial strains.

entities.name: NALIDIXIC ACID
entities.description: An antibiotic used to test resistance in rhizobial strains.

entities.name: GENTAMYCIN
entities.description: An antibiotic to which rhizobial strains were sensitive.

entities.name: TETRACYCLINE
entities.description: An antibiotic to which rhizobial strains were sensitive.

entities.name: MANNITOL
entities.description: A carbon source utilized by rhizobial isolates.

entities.name: SUCROSE
entities.description: A carbon source utilized by rhizobial isolates.

entities.name: DEXTROSE
entities.description: A carbon source utilized by rhizobial isolates.

entities.name: GALACTOSE
entities.description: A carbon source utilized by rhizobial isolates.

entities.name: MALTOSE
entities.description: A carbon source utilized by rhizobial isolates.

entities.name: LACTOSE
entities.description: A carbon source utilized by rhizobial isolates.

entities.name: CELLOBIOSE
entities.description: A carbon source utilized by rhizobial isolates.

entities.name: CITRATE
entities.description: A carbon source that rhizobial isolates could not utilize.

entities.name: IN-VITRO CONDITION
entities.description: The laboratory environment where the physiological and biochemical characteristics were studied.

entities.name: ISOLATION
entities.description: The process of extracting rhizobia from root nodules.

entities.name: CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of analyzing the physiological and biochemical properties of the rhizobial isolates.
